title: ricinocarpus fruticosus
intro: Ricinocarpus fruticosus, also known as the tree broom bush, is a shrub native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Ricinocarpus fruticosus include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. Ricinocarpus fruticosus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal properties, and can also be used to make herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
